items.title: How Reco transforms security alerts using Amazon Bedrock
items.summary: In this blog post, we show you how Reco implemented Amazon Bedrock to help transform security alerts and achieve significant improvements in incident response times.

items.title: Integrating Amazon Bedrock AgentCore with Slack
items.summary: In this post, we demonstrate how to build a Slack integration using AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK). You will learn how to deploy the infrastructure with three specialized AWS Lambda functions, configure event subscriptions properly to handle Slack’s security requirements, and implement conversation management patterns that work for many agent use cases.

items.title: Overcoming LLM hallucinations in regulated industries: Artificial Genius’s deterministic models on Amazon Nova
items.summary: In this post, we’re excited to showcase how AWS ISV Partner Artificial Genius is using Amazon SageMaker AI and Amazon Nova to deliver a solution that is probabilistic on input but deterministic on output, helping to enable safe, enterprise-grade adoption.

items.title: Run NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super on Amazon Bedrock
items.summary: This post explores the technical characteristics of the Nemotron 3 Super model and discusses potential application use cases. It also provides technical guidance to get started using this model for your generative AI applications within the Amazon Bedrock environment.

items.title: Use RAG for video generation using Amazon Bedrock and Amazon Nova Reel
items.summary: In this post, we explore our approach to video generation through VRAG, transforming natural language text prompts and images into grounded, high-quality videos. Through this fully automated solution, you can generate realistic, AI-powered video sequences from structured text and image inputs, streamlining the video creation process.

items.title: Introducing V-RAG: revolutionizing AI-powered video production with Retrieval Augmented Generation
items.summary: This post introduces Video Retrieval-Augmented Generation (V-RAG), an approach to help improve video content creation. By combining retrieval augmented generation with advanced video AI models, V-RAG offers an efficient, and reliable solution for generating AI videos.

items.title: Enhanced metrics for Amazon SageMaker AI endpoints: deeper visibility for better performance
items.summary: SageMaker AI endpoints now support enhanced metrics with configurable publishing frequency. This launch provides the granular visibility needed to monitor, troubleshoot, and improve your production endpoints.

items.title: Enforce data residency with Amazon Quick extensions for Microsoft Teams
items.summary: In this post, we will show you how to enforce data residency when deploying Amazon Quick Microsoft Teams extensions across multiple AWS Regions. You will learn how to configure multi-Region Amazon Quick extensions that automatically route users to AWS Region-appropriate resources, helping keep compliance with GDPR and other data sovereignty requirements.

items.title: Kick off Nova customization experiments using Nova Forge SDK
items.summary: In this post, we walk you through the process of using the Nova Forge SDK to train an Amazon Nova model using Amazon SageMaker AI Training Jobs.

items.title: Introducing Nova Forge SDK, a seamless way to customize Nova models for enterprise AI
items.summary: Today, we are launching Nova Forge SDK that makes LLM customization accessible, empowering teams to harness the full potential of language models without the challenges of dependency management, image selection, and recipe configuration and eventually lowering the barrier of entry.
